---
title: \{SET\}~group~ 
subtitle: Overleaf
author: Kyle P Messier
date:  "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    css: "NIEHS.css"
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: false
    gallery: false
    toc: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---


## $\LaTeX$ Software

Our group utilizes $\LaTeX$ to write our manuscripts. LaTeX is great for manuscripts that more than a few equations. It is also part of RMarkdown, so that skill is translatable. 

We have an **Overleaf** professional license, which is an online, collaborative LaTeX software. Please contact Kyle to get links to our **Overleaf** account.
